panels.description: Lists all running SnmpCollector pods with their instance ID, hostname, and Kubernetes node. Confirms replica count and distribution.
panels.title: Pod Identity

panels.description: Rate of SNMP events published to the processing channel by MetricPollJob and SnmpTrapListenerService. Source: snmp_event_published_total.
panels.title: Events Published

panels.description: Rate of events successfully processed through the MediatR pipeline. Source: snmp_event_handled_total.
panels.title: Events Handled

panels.description: Rate of events that threw exceptions during pipeline processing, caught by ExceptionBehavior. Source: snmp_event_errors_total.
panels.title: Event Errors

panels.description: Rate of events that failed MediatR validation (e.g. missing OID, empty value). Source: snmp_event_rejected_total.
panels.title: Events Rejected

panels.description: Rate of SNMP GET poll cycles completed by MetricPollJob. Source: snmp_poll_executed_total.
panels.title: Polls Executed

panels.description: Rate of SNMP trap PDUs received by SnmpTrapListenerService. Source: snmp_trap_received_total.
panels.title: Traps Received

panels.description: Rate of traps rejected due to SNMP community string mismatch. Source: snmp_trap_auth_failed_total.
panels.title: Trap Auth Failed

panels.description: Rate of traps dropped because the processing channel was full. Source: snmp_trap_dropped_total.
panels.title: Traps Dropped

panels.description: Rate of poll attempts where the target device did not respond (SNMP timeout). Source: snmp_poll_unreachable_total.
panels.title: Poll Unreachable

panels.description: Rate of polls that succeeded after a device was previously marked unreachable. Source: snmp_poll_recovered_total.
panels.title: Poll Recovered

panels.description: Rate of SNMP samples routed to tenant vector metric slots by TenantVectorFanOutBehavior. Source: snmp_tenantvector_routed_total.
panels.title: Tenant Vector Routed

panels.description: P99 duration of SnapshotJob evaluation cycles. Source: snmp_snapshot_cycle_duration_ms histogram.
panels.title: Snapshot Cycle Duration (P99)

panels.description: Rate of SNMP SET commands successfully executed by CommandWorkerService. Source: snmp_command_sent_total.
panels.title: Command Sent

panels.description: Rate of SNMP SET commands that failed (timeout, SNMP error, or device not found). Source: snmp_command_failed_total.
panels.title: Command Failed

panels.description: Rate of SNMP SET commands skipped by the suppression cache. Source: snmp_command_suppressed_total.
panels.title: Command Suppressed

panels.description: Rate of .NET garbage collections by generation (Gen0, Gen1, Gen2). High Gen2 rates may indicate memory pressure. Source: dotnet_gc_collections_total.
panels.title: GC Collections Rate

panels.description: Rate of CPU time consumed per pod. Sustained spikes indicate runaway loops, stuck polls, or GC thrashing.
panels.title: CPU Time

panels.description: Total physical memory (RSS) used by each pod. Source: dotnet_process_memory_working_set_bytes.
panels.title: Process Working Set

panels.description: Rate of exceptions thrown per pod. Spikes indicate something broke - fastest anomaly detection signal.
panels.title: Exceptions

panels.description: Number of active .NET thread pool threads. Source: dotnet_thread_pool_thread_count_total.
panels.title: Thread Pool Threads

panels.description: Number of work items queued to the .NET thread pool. Sustained non-zero values indicate thread starvation. Source: dotnet_thread_pool_queue_length_total.
panels.title: Thread Pool Queue Length
